## Overview

Briefly describe the frontend changes and the user problem it solves.

## Component / Feature Scope

- Affected components/pages:  
  e.g. `Modal`, `FormBuilder`, `UserProfile`

- Type of change:
  - [ ] UI/UX polish
  - [ ] Accessibility improvement
  - [ ] Refactor / optimization
  - [ ] Validation / error handling
  - [ ] New component / feature
  - [ ] Performance / lazy loading improvement
  - [ ] Test suite enhancement

## Screenshots / Preview

Attach before-and-after screenshots, GIFs, or links if applicable.

## Test Coverage

- [ ] Unit tests written or updated
- [ ] Async flow or edge case covered
- [ ] No warnings

## Validation & UX

- [ ] All inputs validated in UI (not only backend)
- [ ] Error states surfaced clearly (no alerts or silent fails)
- [ ] Keyboard & screen reader accessible
- [ ] Responsive across breakpoints


## Links

- Jira / Design doc (if any)

---

Thanks for making PR request.
